description_long: This is a rectangular wall-mounted mirror with a simple, modern white frame. The reflective surface is heavily marked with red handprints and splatters, giving it a distressed or vandalized appearance. The frame is thin and uniform, with clean, straight edges and no decorative embellishments. The mirror's surface appears to be glass, but the markings obscure much of its reflectivity. The object is relatively flat and lightweight, suitable for mounting on a vertical surface. Its overall design is utilitarian, with the striking red markings being its most distinctive feature.
description: A rectangular white-framed mirror with red handprints and splatters covering the glass, giving it a distressed look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full mirror surface with prominent red handprints and splatters on the glass.
description_view_1: Side profile view revealing the thinness of the frame and mirror, with no visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, displaying the red markings and the white frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, again showing the slim profile and plain white frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, minimalist white frame with straight edges and no decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_quality: slightly distorted due to heavy red markings and splatters
